text:
Before Lights Out (Instrumental) is the 13th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The track is an instrumental version of Before Lights Out, and therefore a remix of APETITAN.

All occurrences

Episode 52 - Bertholdt is launched into battle
